violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (onions) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff moved eggs during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

According to cooling log (attached), beans and carnitas, which was prepared in advance, were not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours. Inspector reviewed logs and potential corrective action with PIC. PIC reviewed the logs with staff during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Refrigerator located in the rear of the kitchen was not in good repair. Inspector observed ambient temperature of 43-44 degrees. PIC informed inspector that service is scheduled for today when gasket arrives. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
Onions were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
Prep unit was observed to be leaking. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023

Employees' phone was observed stored on top of the gloves in the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (prep unit, cutting boards ) were observed with rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

Knives were stored on an unclean surface (in between prep unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
Prep unit was observed to be leaking. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023
Observed mop sink to have a leak from the faucet. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
Hole was observed in floor (food preparation). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2023
The floors in the kitchen area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen preparation area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
